title: Centipede Control New Rochelle NY
metaDescription: Expert centipede control in New Rochelle, NY. Fast removal of house centipedes from homes and businesses. Licensed exterminators serving Westchester. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: New Rochelle homeowners don't have to live with creepy centipedes crawling through their properties. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert centipede removal services throughout New Rochelle, from historic North Avenue homes to modern waterfront condos along Echo Bay. Our licensed technicians eliminate centipede infestations quickly and effectively with treatments ranging from $350 to $550.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Westchester County for years with fast, reliable centipede control solutions. Our experienced technicians understand the unique pest challenges in New Rochelle's diverse neighborhoods and use targeted treatments that protect your family and pets while eliminating centipedes at the source.
localContext: New Rochelle's proximity to Long Island Sound and mix of older Victorian homes and newer developments creates ideal conditions for house centipedes seeking moisture and shelter. From Wykagyl to the downtown area near Huguenot Park, our team treats centipede problems in basements, crawl spaces, and bathrooms throughout the city's varied residential architecture.

faqs.question: Why are centipedes common in New Rochelle homes?
faqs.answer: New Rochelle's humid climate near Long Island Sound, combined with many older homes featuring stone foundations and basements, creates perfect conditions for centipedes. They're attracted to moisture in bathrooms, basements, and crawl spaces, and feed on other small insects already present in your home.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a centipede problem in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Most centipede infestations in New Rochelle homes can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of our initial treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within 1-2 weeks as we address both the centipedes and their food sources. Follow-up visits ensure long-term protection for your property.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 centipede control service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection of your New Rochelle property, identification of entry points and moisture issues, targeted interior and exterior treatments, elimination of centipede prey insects, and sealing of common entry points. Price varies based on property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: Are centipede treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We focus on targeted applications in areas where centipedes hide while minimizing exposure in living spaces. You can typically return to treated areas within 2-4 hours after service.
